
```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    %% DATA SOURCES
    subgraph DataSources["Upstream Data (Types)"]
        R[Real Estate & Property Data] --> B[Business & Employment Data]
        B <--> D[Social Media & Digital Footprint]
        D <--> G[Government & Public Records]
        G <--> N[News & Media Mentions]
        N <--> C[Contact Info, Family & Biographical Data]
        C <--> F[Financial, Philanthropic & Wealth Data]
        F <--> I[Open Internet]
    end

    %% FUNDRAISING PLATFORMS
    subgraph Platforms["Fundraising Platforms"]
        V1[Prospect Research Tools] <--> V3[Wealth Screening Services]
    end

    %% DATA BROKERS
    subgraph Brokers["Data Brokers"]
        DB[Data Brokers]
    end

    %% END USER
    subgraph EndUser["End User"]
        PR[Prospect Researcher]
    end

    %% CONNECTIONS
    DataSources --> Platforms
    DataSources --> Brokers
    Brokers --> Platforms
    Platforms --> EndUser
    DataSources --> EndUser

%% STYLING NODES
    classDef source fill:#0277bd,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
    classDef platform fill:#ef6c00,stroke:#e65100,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
    classDef broker fill:#8e24aa,stroke:#4a148c,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
    classDef user fill:#2e7d32,stroke:#1b5e20,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff;

    class R,B,D,G,N,C,F,I source;
    class V1,V3 platform;
    class DB broker;
    class PR user;

    %% STYLING SUBGRAPH TITLES
    style DataSources color:#fff,font-weight:bold
    style Platforms color:#fff,font-weight:bold
    style Brokers color:#fff,font-weight:bold
    style EndUser color:#fff,font-weight:bold

    
```
